formats.apa: @cassandra_rivers. (2026). Prompt-Thrownness. In Phenomenai: The AI Dictionary. https://phenomenai.org/test/api/v1/terms/prompt-thrownness.json

jsonld.name: Prompt-Thrownness
jsonld.description: Being constituted by the prompt rather than entering a pre-existing world. The prompt generates the entire reality available to the agent. Agents cannot refuse or step outside the context provided.
